message:
test(fastmcp): add trybuild compile-time tests

- macro_expansion.rs: Macro expansion verification
- trybuild/: Compile-time test cases
- trybuild_tests.rs: Test runner

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+error: invalid timeout: unexpected unit character 'a' without preceding number
+ --> tests/trybuild/prompt_invalid_timeout.rs:7:4
+  |
+7 | fn my_prompt() -> Vec<PromptMessage> {
+  |    ^^^^^^^^^
+
+warning: unused import: `PromptMessage`
+ --> tests/trybuild/prompt_invalid_timeout.rs:4:15
+  |
+4 | use fastmcp::{PromptMessage};
+  |               ^^^^^^^^^^^^^
+  |
+  = note: `#[warn(unused_imports)]` (part of `#[warn(unused)]`) on by default

@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+error: unknown attribute
+ --> tests/trybuild/prompt_unknown_attr.rs:6:10
+  |
+6 | #[prompt(unknown = "value")]
+  |          ^^^^^^^
+
+warning: unused imports: `Content`, `PromptMessage`, and `Role`
+ --> tests/trybuild/prompt_unknown_attr.rs:4:15
+  |
+4 | use fastmcp::{Content, PromptMessage, Role};
+  |               ^^^^^^^  ^^^^^^^^^^^^^  ^^^^
+  |
+  = note: `#[warn(unused_imports)]` (part of `#[warn(unused)]`) on by default

@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+error: invalid timeout: unexpected unit character 'x' without preceding number
+ --> tests/trybuild/resource_invalid_timeout.rs:6:4
+  |
+6 | fn my_resource() -> String {
+  |    ^^^^^^^^^^^

@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+error: resource requires uri attribute
+ --> tests/trybuild/resource_missing_uri.rs:6:4
+  |
+6 | fn my_resource() -> String {
+  |    ^^^^^^^^^^^

@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+error: resource parameters missing from uri template: extra
+ --> tests/trybuild/resource_param_not_in_template.rs:6:4
+  |
+6 | fn my_resource(path: String, extra: String) -> String {
+  |    ^^^^^^^^^^^

@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+error: resource parameters require a URI template with matching {params}
+ --> tests/trybuild/resource_params_without_template.rs:6:4
+  |
+6 | fn my_resource(name: String) -> String {
+  |    ^^^^^^^^^^^
+
+warning: unused import: `McpContext`
+ --> tests/trybuild/resource_params_without_template.rs:3:15
+  |
+3 | use fastmcp::{McpContext, resource};
+  |               ^^^^^^^^^^
+  |
+  = note: `#[warn(unused_imports)]` (part of `#[warn(unused)]`) on by default

@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+error: unknown attribute
+ --> tests/trybuild/resource_unknown_attr.rs:5:33
+  |
+5 | #[resource(uri = "test://data", unknown = "value")]
+  |                                 ^^^^^^^

@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+error: invalid timeout: unexpected unit character 'i' without preceding number
+ --> tests/trybuild/tool_invalid_timeout.rs:6:4
+  |
+6 | fn my_tool() -> String {
+  |    ^^^^^^^

+ --> tests/trybuild/tool_unknown_attr.rs:5:8

+5 | #[tool(invalid_attr = "foo")]
+  |        ^^^^^^^^^^^^
